title: Alberto Broggi
body: Alberto Broggi is General Manager at VisLab srl (spinoff of the University of Parma acquired by Silicon-Valley company Ambarella Inc. in June 2015) and  a professor of Computer Engineering at the University of Parma in Italy.
categories: Academic staff of the University of Parma
Articles with unsourced statements from October 2017
Short description is different from Wikidata
